/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_scheduler.dir/test_scheduler_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_scheduler.dir/tests/test_scheduler.cpp.o -o test_scheduler -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib lib/libgtest_main.a libbacky_x_core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest lib/libgtest.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers -framework Security -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation -framework IOKit
